title: Validate Checkpoint Extensibility workflow result payload

storyId.description: Story id the validation run was bound to.

evidenceGate.description: Final observed outcome of pipeline--e2e-evidence-gate (Lane A evidence).

commandGate.description: Final observed outcome of pipeline--e2e-command-gate (Lane A command).

moduleGate.description: Final observed outcome of pipeline--e2e-module-gate (Lane B rung-3 module).

blockedProbeObserved.description: True when the probe-blocked step observed a fail-closed "Blocked" advance BEFORE evidence was written.
